game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: Top-down action-adventure with tight real-time combat and puzzle dungeons. Core loop: explore overworld → enter dungeon → find the dungeon item → solve switch/torch/block puzzles → beat boss → unlock new areas. Combat: eight-direction movement, sword slashes with a chargeable Spin Attack, and a front-facing shield that auto-blocks basic projectiles. Progression is item-gated: Small Keys/Big Key open routes; Pegasus Boots add a dash for breaking obstacles and long gaps; Hookshot grapples across pits and stuns; Hammer flips/opens peg paths; Power Glove/Titan’s Mitt lift heavier blocks; Zora’s Flippers enable swimming; Bow, Bombs, and Boomerang provide simple ranged/control options. A Magic Meter powers select tools (rods/cape/canes) but is secondary. World switching between Light and Dark realms (via Mirror/Moon Pearl) reconfigures layouts and access. Enemy design teaches counters: Soldiers (melee/archer) for timing and shield angles; Beamos punish standing still in their sight lines; Wizzrobes phase in for brief attack windows; Wallmasters grab to reset progress; Hardhat Beetles shove you toward pits. Bosses are straightforward item checks that reward positioning and clean weapon swaps.
game_info.description: Embark on an epic adventure through dungeons and realms! Explore the overworld, delve into dungeons to find keys and special items, solve puzzles with switches and blocks, and defeat powerful bosses. Master combat with your sword and shield, discover new abilities like the Dash Boots and Hookshot, and switch between Light and Dark realms to unlock new paths. Your goal: collect all dungeon treasures and defeat the final boss to restore peace to the land!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move in eight directions
Z: Swing sword / Charge and release for Spin Attack
Space: Use equipped item (Hookshot, Bomb, Bow, etc.)
Shift: Dash (when Dash Boots acquired)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to title screen
